seoTitle: Chandada vs Chapel Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Chandada and Chapel Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Chandada vs Chapel Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chandada and Chapel Hill.
heading: Chandada vs Chapel Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chandada, South Australia and Chapel Hill, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chandada has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Chapel Hill (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chandada or Chapel Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chandada has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Chapel Hill scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chandada scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Chapel Hill scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chandada or Chapel Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chandada has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
